name: finlens-catalyst-mapper
description: Public catalyst-to-target mapping skills for China and global markets.

author.name: Shiyun Xin, Jiayi Wang, Kai Yi

interface.shortDescription: Catalyst-to-target mapping for China and global markets.
interface.longDescription: A public-safe research plugin that turns events, industry shifts, supply chain disruptions, resource moves, and macro shocks into disciplined target maps across equities, ETFs, commodities, rates, and FX.
interface.developerName: Shiyun Xin, Jiayi Wang, Kai Yi
defaultPrompt: 用中文分析一个催化事件会如何传导到 A 股和港股。
Map a global macro shock into U.S. equity and ETF targets.
Compare beneficiaries, losers, and invalidation signals for this thesis.
